markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Zuplo's growth goals, SEO strategy, and explore programmatic content generation for API documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zuplo aims to increase signups and demos through SEO, with a focus on differentiating in the API management space](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Current SEO efforts show promising results, with traffic and signups increasing since September](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Programmatic content generation for API documentation presents a scalable opportunity to create 1500+ pages](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Content accuracy and freshness are crucial concerns for the programmatic approach](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

## Topics

### Zuplo's Business and Growth Strategy

  - [Zuplo operates in the API management space, competing with big cloud providers and startups](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Differentiators: More flexible, developer-friendly platform; ability to write code at the API gateway](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Growth focus: Increase signups and demos (valued 10:1 vs. regular signups)](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [SEO identified as a promising area for growth, started in September last year](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Mix of content creation, technical SEO, and some programmatic/AI-driven approaches](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Current SEO Performance

  - [Significant traffic increase visible in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Translating to increased signups and demos](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Working with GrowthX for \~3 months, seeing "decent results"](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Typical SEO timeline: 3 months for articles to reach maximum ranking potential](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Cannibalization concerns addressed; multiple ranking pages for keywords generally healthy](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)

### Programmatic Content Generation for APIs

  - [Proposal to create 1500+ pages of API documentation content](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Data source: API Guru repository with 2,500+ APIs (pruned to \~1500)](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Content structure: API name, authentication, available endpoints, competitors, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Challenge: Ensuring content accuracy and freshness](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Current pace: 4 articles/week to refine the content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Delivery format: CSV with identifier and markdown content, organized by sections](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

### Content Refresh and Maintenance

  - [Need for regular content updates due to frequent API changes](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Exploring options for automated monthly refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate refresh rates and options for maintaining content freshness](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to internally test content generation for a few APIs from the API Guru repository](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [Develop a scalable process for generating accurate API documentation content](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Investigate and propose content refresh rates and maintenance strategies](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Adrian to design the webpage structure for hosting the generated content](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Explore options for efficient indexing of the large volume of new content](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Continue refining the content generation prompts to ensure accuracy and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/5GzwDfMd8KjGCQQCRM2RrR7y-ZdjxSso?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
